name: Beef Bourguignonne II
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and stir onions and mushrooms in hot shortening until onions are tender; drain on paper towels.
2. Brown meat in the same skillet, adding more shortening as necessary. Remove from heat.
3. Sprinkle seasonings over meat.
4. Mix flour with beef stock; pour into the skillet.
5. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly. Boil 1 minute.
6. Stir in red burgundy wine. Cover and simmer until meat is tender (1½ to 2 hours). Ensure liquid always just covers the meat. If necessary, add a little more beef stock and red burgundy (1 part stock to 2 parts wine).
7. Gently stir in onions and mushrooms; cook uncovered for an additional 15 minutes, or until heated through.
